name: I-Diazepam
description: I-benzodiazepine esebenza isikhathi eside. Isetshenziselwa ukuphatha ukuquleka, i-muscle spasm, ne-anxiolysis. Ijeli ye-Rectal (Diastat) iwusizo kuzilungiselelo zenkambu lapho i-IV ingatholakali. Ubude besikhathi eside kune-lorazepam.
indications: I-muscle spasm ngenxa yokulimala komgogodla noma i-tetanus
dose: Ukubanjwa: 5-10 mg IV push slow. Phinda u-q10-15 amaminithi (ubukhulu obungu-30 mg). I-Rectal: 0.2-0.5 mg/kg. Ukumuncwa kwe-IM kuyashintshashintsha -- gwema i-IM uma kungenzeka.
warnings: Ukumuncwa kwe-IM kuyaguquguquka futhi kubuhlungu -- khetha i-IV, i-rectal, noma sebenzisa i-midazolam IM esikhundleni salokho.
Ubude besikhathi eside be-sedation (24-48h ngemithamo ephindaphindiwe).
Ukulimala komenzeli wezinzwa: i-diazepam ifakiwe kukhithi ye-CHEMPACK yokuquleka ngenxa yenkinga ye-cholinergic.

pediatric.dose: IV: 0.1-0.3 mg/kg (ubukhulu obungu-10 mg). I-Rectal: 0.3-0.5 mg/kg. Sebenzisa umzila we-rectal uma i-IV ingatholakali.
pediatric.note: Ijeli ye-diastat ye-rectal iwusizo ikakhulukazi ekubanjweni kwezingane kuzilungiselelo zenkambu.

obstetric.note: Iwela i-placenta. Kungabangela hypotonia ezisanda kuzalwa, ukucindezeleka kokuphefumula. Sebenzisa kuphela ukuquleka komama okungaphenduli ku-magnesium.

source: JTS CPG / CHEMPACK Program / Standard Seizure Management
